text:
You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies C and D on it, and Blue Mountain has genies X and F on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet N generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet J generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies S and T on it, and Blue Mountain has genies Y and C on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet N generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet L generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies Q and K on it, and Blue Mountain has genies D and T on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet U generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet H generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies G and C on it, and Blue Mountain has genies S and N on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet D generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet K generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

Picking option J generally leads to state B, and picking option M generally leads to state O.

You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies F and K on it, and Blue Mountain has genies A and S on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet X generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet E generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state H, you have the choice between options U and A.
If you are in state M, you have the choice between options B and O.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option F generally leads to state H, and picking option D generally leads to state M.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies C and D on it, and Blue Mountain has genies G and B on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet Q generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet S generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land. You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain. Pink Mountain has genies J and L on it, and Blue Mountain has genies X and G on it. Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it. When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it. If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin. Each genie’s interest in music changes with time. To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly. Magic carpet T generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet P generally flies to Blue Mountain. However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet. In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain. You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key. You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies I and X on it, and Blue Mountain has genies E and N on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet F generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet V generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land. You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain. Pink Mountain has genies N and Z on it, and Blue Mountain has genies P and J on it. Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it. When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it. If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin. Each genie’s interest in music changes with time. To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly. Magic carpet V generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet K generally flies to Blue Mountain. However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet. In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain. You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key. You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state Y, you have the choice between options U and O.
If you are in state S, you have the choice between options T and G.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option N generally leads to state Y, and picking option B generally leads to state S.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies D and U on it, and Blue Mountain has genies I and T on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet K generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet B generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state K, you have the choice between options A and S.
If you are in state M, you have the choice between options B and F.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option L generally leads to state K, and picking option W generally leads to state M.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies T and O on it, and Blue Mountain has genies W and M on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet Y generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet V generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies O and N on it, and Blue Mountain has genies V and Y on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet W generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet I generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land. You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain. Pink Mountain has genies E and D on it, and Blue Mountain has genies P and M on it. Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it. When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it. If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin. Each genie’s interest in music changes with time. To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly. Magic carpet T generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet Y generally flies to Blue Mountain. However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet. In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain. You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key. You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state Z, you have the choice between options K and L.
If you are in state I, you have the choice between options S and R.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option D generally leads to state Z, and picking option M generally leads to state I.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies K and N on it, and Blue Mountain has genies I and T on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet M generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet Y generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state J, you have the choice between options F and D.
If you are in state Q, you have the choice between options A and E.

How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option U generally leads to state J, and picking option N generally leads to state Q.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies J and G on it, and Blue Mountain has genies M and X on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet E generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet H generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies C and L on it, and Blue Mountain has genies H and S on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet B generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet D generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies O and M on it, and Blue Mountain has genies B and D on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet Z generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet R generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state H, you have the choice between options D and M.
If you are in state Y, you have the choice between options Q and G.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option I generally leads to state H, and picking option K generally leads to state Y.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies N and M on it, and Blue Mountain has genies Z and G on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet E generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet Y generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state N, you have the choice between options Q and T.
If you are in state D, you have the choice between options F and A.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option O generally leads to state N, and picking option G generally leads to state D.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.

If you are in state W, you have the choice between options Z and J.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option X generally leads to state G, and picking option L generally leads to state W.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies H and Y on it, and Blue Mountain has genies F and Q on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet A generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet W generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land. You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain. Pink Mountain has genies B and A on it, and Blue Mountain has genies P and O on it. Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it. When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it. If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin. Each genie’s interest in music changes with time. To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly. Magic carpet C generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet L generally flies to Blue Mountain. However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet. In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain. You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key. You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state Q, you have the choice between options V and T.
If you are in state C, you have the choice between options D and E.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option O generally leads to state Q, and picking option H generally leads to state C.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

Picking option S generally leads to state K, and picking option Z generally leads to state V.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state A, you have the choice between options D and Z.
If you are in state N, you have the choice between options I and Y.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option E generally leads to state A, and picking option O generally leads to state N.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state N, you have the choice between options C and Z.
If you are in state B, you have the choice between options J and H.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option L generally leads to state N, and picking option R generally leads to state B.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies J and A on it, and Blue Mountain has genies C and Z on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet Q generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet F generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies V and B on it, and Blue Mountain has genies Y and K on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet Q generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet A generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies U and D on it, and Blue Mountain has genies S and N on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet C generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet V generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land. You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain. Pink Mountain has genies X and R on it, and Blue Mountain has genies S and V on it. Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it. When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it. If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin. Each genie’s interest in music changes with time. To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly. Magic carpet F generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet P generally flies to Blue Mountain. However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet. In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain. You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key. You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land. You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain. Pink Mountain has genies H and S on it, and Blue Mountain has genies Q and R on it. Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it. When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it. If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin. Each genie’s interest in music changes with time. To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly. Magic carpet D generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet P generally flies to Blue Mountain. However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet. In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain. You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key. You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state T, you have the choice between options R and B.
If you are in state Y, you have the choice between options U and M.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option L generally leads to state T, and picking option K generally leads to state Y.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state Q, you have the choice between options R and G.
If you are in state W, you have the choice between options A and U.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option X generally leads to state Q, and picking option Z generally leads to state W.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land. You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain. Pink Mountain has genies L and P on it, and Blue Mountain has genies K and C on it. Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it. When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it. If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin. Each genie’s interest in music changes with time. To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly. Magic carpet B generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet O generally flies to Blue Mountain. However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet. In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain. You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key. You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies J and W on it, and Blue Mountain has genies T and Q on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet K generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet U generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies J and Y on it, and Blue Mountain has genies S and C on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet U generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet N generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies J and Y on it, and Blue Mountain has genies V and O on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet G generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet H generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state B, you have the choice between options M and S.
If you are in state E, you have the choice between options X and I.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option D generally leads to state B, and picking option K generally leads to state E.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies X and U on it, and Blue Mountain has genies F and I on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet Q generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet N generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are presented with magic carpets N and Q. You press <<N>>. You end up on Blue Mountain. You are presented with lamp F and lamp I. You rub lamp <<I>>. You receive 1 coins.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies X and B on it, and Blue Mountain has genies I and M on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet F generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet T generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies B and O on it, and Blue Mountain has genies Z and F on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet R generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet C generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies T and Q on it, and Blue Mountain has genies C and X on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet N generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet L generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies Q and R on it, and Blue Mountain has genies O and C on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet L generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet F generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies K and L on it, and Blue Mountain has genies U and X on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet H generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet I generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land. You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain. Pink Mountain has genies F and U on it, and Blue Mountain has genies V and T on it. Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it. When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it. If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin. Each genie’s interest in music changes with time. To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly. Magic carpet P generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet G generally flies to Blue Mountain. However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet. In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain. You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key. You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state V, you have the choice between options E and S.
If you are in state Z, you have the choice between options Q and H.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option T generally leads to state V, and picking option X generally leads to state Z.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies O and R on it, and Blue Mountain has genies U and E on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet W generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet X generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing multiple rounds of a game.
Your goal is to collect as many gold coins as possible as you visit different states.
If you are in state Z, you have the choice between options B and W.
If you are in state S, you have the choice between options C and F.
Picking one of these options may result in a gold coin.
How likely an option leads to a gold coin slowly changes during the game.
Picking option D generally leads to state Z, and picking option V generally leads to state S.
However, on rare occasions you will end up in the other state.
You can select an option by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies D and V on it, and Blue Mountain has genies R and L on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet K generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet U generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies V and K on it, and Blue Mountain has genies M and F on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet E generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet B generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies H and D on it, and Blue Mountain has genies C and G on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet K generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet W generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies U and T on it, and Blue Mountain has genies G and Z on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet R generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet Q generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land. You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain. Pink Mountain has genies F and E on it, and Blue Mountain has genies K and P on it. Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it. When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it. If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin. Each genie’s interest in music changes with time. To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly. Magic carpet U generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet D generally flies to Blue Mountain. However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet. In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain. You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key. You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies K and F on it, and Blue Mountain has genies T and H on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet L generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet N generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.

You are playing the role of a musician living in a fantasy land.
You play the flute for gold coins to an audience of genies, who live inside magic lamps on Pink Mountain and Blue Mountain.
Pink Mountain has genies I and O on it, and Blue Mountain has genies B and C on it.
Each genie lives in a lamp with the corresponding letter on it.
When you arrive on a mountain, you can pick up a lamp and rub it.
If the genie is in the mood for music, he will come out of his lamp, listen to a song, and give you a gold coin.
Each genie’s interest in music changes with time.
To go to the mountains, you chose one of two magic carpets, which you purchase from a magician, who enchants them to fly.
Magic carpet N generally flies to Pink Mountain, and magic carpet A generally flies to Blue Mountain.
However, on rare occasions a strong wind blowing from that mountain makes flying there too dangerous because the wind might blow you off the carpet.
In this case, the carpet is forced to land instead on the other mountain.
You can take a magic carpet or pick up a lamp and rub it by pressing the corresponding key.
